warmup: Find the average of 12, 18, 24, 36, 42. Then compute 2 × 500 × 300 / (500 + 300) and state what this formula represents.

practice.title: Test Score Average Calculator
practice.description: A student scored 78, 82, 65, 91, and 84 in five unit tests. Write a function that computes the average score. Then simulate adding a 6th test: if the new average becomes 80, what was the 6th score?

practice.title: Round Trip Average Speed
practice.description: A delivery bike goes from warehouse to market at 45 km/h and returns at 30 km/h. The distance is 90 km each way. Compute the average speed using both the full method (total_distance/total_time) and the shortcut formula. Verify they match.

practice.title: New Employee Salary Impact
practice.description: The average salary of 12 engineers at a startup is Rs 52,000. A new CTO joins and the average rises to Rs 56,000. Write a function to find the CTO's salary. Then simulate another hire: if a fresh grad joining at Rs 28,000 pulls the average back down, what is the new average?
practice.signature: new_hire_salary(old_avg, old_count, new_avg, new_count) and new_average_with_fresh_grad(salary, new_count)

practice.title: Weighted Class Average
practice.description: Section A has 35 students with average marks 75. Section B has 45 students with average marks 68. Write a function to find the combined average. Then answer: how many more students must Section A add at an average of 80 to raise the combined average to 72?

practice.title: Monthly Temperature Trend
practice.description: A city's daily temperatures for the first 10 days of June average 31 °C. For the next 5 days, the average drops to 28 °C. Write a function to compute the overall 15-day average. Then: if the remaining 15 days need an overall monthly average of 30 °C, what must their average be?
practice.signature: partial_average(sum_first, days_first, avg_second, days_second) and required_remaining_sum(total_days, target_avg, sum_so_far)
